title: Workspace Context Router Family
goal: Implement #453 by presenting start, summary, report, defaults, and preflight as one context-router family in docs and compact output labels.
non_goals: Do not break or rename existing commands.
Do not add a new first-contact surface.
Do not create a larger command taxonomy.

intent.outcome: Agents can choose the right compact context-router view without treating each command as a separate product layer.
intent.constraints: Keep existing commands and startup compact; no new first-contact surface.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest docs/output labels that make the shared family visible.
intent.escalation: Escalate if consolidation requires command behavior changes or new lifecycle machinery.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, close #453, and promote #454 maintenance-pressure view as the next #450 child.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof selector, planning doctor, and adapter-surface refresh if startup docs change

invariants: No new first-contact surface is added.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #454-#460 plus #467/#469/#471 remain in the feature-tier and surface-merge lane.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #453 closeout, promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: The compact context commands now present as one context-router family, so agents can pick start, summary, report, defaults, or preflight as views rather than separate product layers.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Direct CLI rendering changes still need root CLI authority proof until more output surfaces move behind generated definitions.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: workspace CLI tests, ruff, maintainer-surface refresh, planning-surface check, proof selector, planning doctor, and root CLI authority query passed.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Merge compact context commands into a context-router family.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not add a new first-contact surface or break existing commands.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which docs/output labels carry the shared family concept.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The change needs behavioral command consolidation rather than docs/output compression.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Make compact commands feel like one small router, not several product concepts.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can an agent pick the right context view without reading a separate handbook?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed slice, close #453, and promote #454 maintenance-pressure view as the next #450 child.
invariants: No new first-contact surface is added.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-context-router-family.plan.json README.md AGENTS.md docs/contributor-playbook.md src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/startup_context.schema.json tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
completion_criteria: Docs describe start, summary, report, defaults, and preflight as one context-router family.
Agents can choose the right view without treating each command as a separate product layer.
No new first-contact surface is added.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Docs and compact command payloads now describe start, summary, report, defaults, and preflight as one context-router family. Startup schema and CLI tests cover the new payload.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; proof selector; planning doctor; root CLI authority query.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: #454 maintenance-pressure view remains the next #450 child.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archive plan records #453 as closed while keeping #450 continuation explicit.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-context-router-family.plan.json README.md AGENTS.md docs/contributor-playbook.md src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/startup_context.schema.json tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
proof_report.proof achieved now: The context-router family is visible in compact startup/default/report/preflight outputs and in first-contact docs without adding a new command or surface.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: CLI tests assert startup/default/report/preflight context_router payloads, the startup schema requires the payload, and generated maintainer surfaces are fresh.

discard.summary: Local validation transcript details beyond command names and pass/fail status.

continuation.summary: #454 maintenance-pressure view is the next bounded #450 child.
